tagline.id: Ikhlas Beramal — Membangun Umat, Merawat Bangsa
tagline.en: Sincere in Service — Building Community, Nurturing the Nation

address.id: Jl. Lapangan Banteng Barat No.3-4, Jakarta Pusat 10710
address.en: Jl. Lapangan Banteng Barat No.3-4, Central Jakarta 10710

servicesDesc.id: Akses cepat menuju layanan terpenting Kementerian Agama, dari haji hingga sertifikasi halal.
servicesDesc.en: Quick access to the Ministry's key services — from hajj to halal certification.

greetingTitle.id: Melayani dengan Ikhlas, Bekerja dengan Data
greetingTitle.en: Serve with Sincerity, Work with Data

greetingBody.id: Kementerian Agama berkomitmen menghadirkan layanan yang lebih dekat, lebih cepat, dan lebih transparan bagi seluruh umat beragama di Indonesia. Dengan transformasi digital dan penguatan moderasi, kami menyongsong masa depan bersama.
greetingBody.en: The Ministry is committed to bringing services closer, faster, and more transparent for all religious communities in Indonesia. Through digital transformation and strengthened moderation, we build the future together.

ctaDesc.id: Hubungi Kementerian Agama atau kunjungi PTSP terdekat. Kami siap melayani.
ctaDesc.en: Contact the Ministry of Religious Affairs or visit the nearest one-stop office. We are ready to serve.
